title: v6.5 bridge: Codify CLI help boundary and runtime-backed evidence rule
description: Record the v6.5 bridge rule that AOF CLI help is an AI-oriented routing surface, not a full human manual or proof surface. When command help is incomplete, use existing artifact formats for manual evidence and execute runtime verification, audit, self-audit, and retrospective commands to leave proof.
triage_notes: User clarified that some commands do not expose sufficient --help detail; do not block runtime usage. Treat command registry/help as routing, and require runtime command evidence for claims. This is a v6.5 bridge task because Mission Control / Human Recognition must expose runtime-backed evidence without mistaking command discovery for proof.
